name: sessionstart-snapshot
doc: SessionStart (core scope) injects the reconciliation snapshot as additionalContext, concatenated onto the existing CLAUDE.md/dev-context injection (dispatch.ts sessionStart → withSnapshot). $TMP is not a git repo so the Git section is omitted, but the Version collector always renders the running harness version (snapshot/version.ts collectVersion), so the block is present. Proves the wiring end-to-end through the real CLI: renderSnapshot → attachSnapshot → contextResponse. Unit parity: test/snapshot.test.ts.

steps.doc: SessionStart → stdout carries the snapshot heading + the always-present harness version line inside additionalContext.
